title: OR CFP Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q4 2024: Credit Generation Falls 15% Amid Rising Deficits
content:
Key Takeaways:

Oregonâ€™s Clean Fuels Program saw a 15% drop in credit generation in Q4 2024, with steep declines in ethanol, renewable diesel, and B5 biodiesel credits. Deficits edged up as gasoline and diesel volumes increased. On the policy side, lawmakers introduced TRIP 2025 to raise transportation revenue, while DEQ extended CFP deadlines following a major cyberattack.
author: Mansift Kaur
